filters.q: from:(noreply@google.com OR no-reply@steampowered.com OR noreply@swiggy.in OR noreply@zomato.com OR noreply@amazon.in OR donotreply@hdfcbank.com) newer_than:1h

parameters.query: SELECT id FROM raw_events WHERE message_id = $1
INSERT INTO raw_events (source, message_id, received_at, subject, sender, body_text) VALUES ('gmail', $1, to_timestamp($2::bigint / 1000), $3, $4, $5) RETURNING id
SELECT id FROM dedup_log WHERE utr IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $1 AND amount = $2 AND direction = $3 AND transaction_time = $4::timestamptz AND account IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $5

nodes.name: Enrich existing transaction

parameters.query: UPDATE parsed_transactions SET merchant = COALESCE(merchant, $1), category_hint = COALESCE(category_hint, $2) WHERE id = (SELECT parsed_transaction_id FROM dedup_log WHERE utr IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $3 AND amount = $4 LIMIT 1)

nodes.notes: Gmail often has better merchant names. Enrich Outlook-sourced records silently.

parameter.name: body
parameter.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: $json.direction === 'debit' ? 1 : 2, categoryId: $json.ebk_category_id, accountId: $json.ebk_account_id, amount: Math.round($json.amount * 100), comment: $json.merchant, time: new Date($json.transaction_time).getTime() / 1000 }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO failed_events (raw_event_id, stage, error_message, raw_payload) VALUES ($1, 'parse', 'Gmail: no regex pattern matched', $2::jsonb)
